query:
INSERT INTO modifier_template_options (template_id, name, price, is_default, sort_order) VALUES 
((SELECT id FROM modifier_templates WHERE name = 'Butter & Sauces' LIMIT 1), 'Butter', '0.00', true, 0),
((SELECT id FROM modifier_templates WHERE name = 'Butter & Sauces' LIMIT 1), 'Mayo', '0.00', false, 1),
((SELECT id FROM modifier_templates WHERE name = 'Butter & Sauces' LIMIT 1), 'Garlic Mayo', '0.00', false, 2),
((SELECT id FROM modifier_templates WHERE name = 'Butter & Sauces' LIMIT 1), 'Sweet Chili', '0.00', false, 3),
((SELECT id FROM modifier_templates WHERE name = 'Butter & Sauces' LIMIT 1), 'Ketchup', '0.00', false, 4),
((SELECT id FROM modifier_templates WHERE name = 'Butter & Sauces' LIMIT 1), 'Brown Sauce', '0.00', false, 5),
((SELECT id FROM modifier_templates WHERE name = 'Butter & Sauces' LIMIT 1), 'Taco Sauce', '0.00', false, 6),
((SELECT id FROM modifier_templates WHERE name = 'Butter & Sauces' LIMIT 1), 'BBQ Sauce', '0.00', false, 7),
((SELECT id FROM modifier_templates WHERE name = 'Butter & Sauces' LIMIT 1), 'Mustard', '0.00', false, 8);
